subcodes.first_line: O thou who art captive to tests and trials! The afflictions that have descended upon thee have come in succession like torrential rain. Praise be to God that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اسیر امتحان و افتتان بلایای وارده چون غیث هاطل پیاپی بر شما رسیده الحمدلله که
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @predictions and prophecies, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
